title: dolomiaea denticulata
intro: Dolomiaea denticulata is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is also known as the Himalayan ragwort. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. Dolomiaea denticulata is used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion.
